evidences.title: Elon Musk # tweets November 7 - Manifold Markets
evidences.content: This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X from November 7 12:00 PM ET to November 14, 2025 12:00 PM ET. For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count. Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as will be counted by the tracker. Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes). Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total. [...] The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at . Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source. evidences.title: Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on ... - Facebook
evidences.content: ## The Hodgetwins's Post ### The Hodgetwins November 20, 2025 · Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on X (formerly Twitter) on November 19, 2025, saying, "I would like to thank Donald Trump for all he has done for America and the world." This came shortly after Trump made a comment at a U.S.–Saudi investment forum asking, “Has he ever thanked me properly?” while referencing Musk. Musk's message appears to signal a shift toward a more cordial relationship with Trump, following months of tension and public disputes between the two. The interaction between Musk and Trump follows a period of high-profile feuding, including Trump’s public remarks and Musk's comments on the state of their relationship. evidences.title: Macro Tech Titan, Author at VC Cross Blog
evidences.content: Macro Tech Titan on December 12, 2025 : Elon Musk confirms reports that SpaceX is going public. As usual, Eric is accurate — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) December 10, 2025 Space-based data centers are now secured… SpaceX has way more satellites in orbit than the rest of the world combined, so maybe we know a thing or two about the subject 🤣 Starlink V3 will be 20kW and launched at scale around Q4 next year. No problem to scale that to >100kW if the satellite mass is shifted towards solar… — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) December 10, 2025 \ \ \ [...] While I have great fondness for @NASA, they will constitute less than 5% of our revenue next year. Commercial Starlink is by far our largest contributor to revenue. Some people have claimed that SpaceX gets “subsidized” by NASA. This is absolutely false. The SpaceX team won… — Elon Musk (@elonmusk) December 6, 2025 Musk has previously stated: The report on SpaceX’s IPO plans sent EchoStar shares up 5% in premarket trading. This is because SpaceX recently bought $17 billion in AWS-4 and H-block spectrum licenses. evidences.title: Twitter under Elon Musk - Wikipedia
evidences.content: BBC News reported in August 2025 that they had discovered a network of "more than 100" accounts openly selling child pornography on X, and that a victim of the "child sexual abuse has begged Elon Musk to stop links offering images of her abuse being posted on his social media platform X." ### Malicious and fake accounts [edit] [...] altered to artificially boost Musk's tweets by a factor of 1,000. Many users observed an overwhelming promotion of his posts in the "For You" tab. Following criticism, the boost was lessened to a smaller factor.
